title: Executive Director, Global Strategic Advisory Department
description:
Your key roles& responsibilities include:

  • Overseeing and enhancing solution capabilities among APAC advisory functions, including building organizational structures for improved capabilities and promoting cross-regional collaboration.

  • Planning, business development, and comprehensive management of APAC advisory operations to strengthen solution functions at APAC offices.

  • Driving and executing regional solution initiatives through internal and external collaboration, with Singapore as a hub.

  • Acting as a playing manager to originate and execute projects across the region.

  • Supervising M&A operations in the APAC region, in cooperation with Securities, advisory function in China, and others.

  • Building a track record and organizational structure for small- and mid-sized M&A transactions through collaboration with MHSS members.

  • Developing regional advisory talent, through the above initiatives.
  • As a dual position with APCB promoting of Japanese and non-Japanese alliance projects and cross-border M&A projects. Disseminating solutions capabilities for Japanese clients to non-Japanese client and responsible for overseeing the outsourcing of general affairs and compliance-related tasks to APCB

What you should have:

·        A Bachelor’s Degree.

·        At least 18years of relevant experience in supporting overseas business development at consulting companies.

·        Strong interpersonal and business writing skills are attributes that will help the candidate perform successfully in this role.

·        Business-level proficiency in both the English and Japanese languages as you are required to communicate, read and understand as well as respond and present in these two languages.

·        Experience working in Japanese banking business environment is advantageous.

·        Strong understanding and affiliation to Japanese financial industry with relevant network.

·        The knowledge and familiarity of internal processes and stakeholders in Head Office.

·        High ability to create materials utilizing power points.

·        Inquisitive mind always aiming for high level, not satisfied with the current situation.

·        Proven experience in managing and leading a team in a managerial role.

postedCompany.description:
Mizuho Bank, Ltd. is a subsidiary of the Japan-based Mizuho Financial Group, Inc. (listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and NYSE) and is one of the largest financial services companies in the world. Mizuho Bank, Ltd. provides financial and strategic solutions for the increasingly diverse and sophisticated needs of its clients with offices located in all the major cities of the world such as Tokyo, New York, London, Hong Kong and Singapore.

Join Mizuho Bank, Ltd., in Singapore, and be part of our expanding team, passionate to build the future together.
postedCompany.name: MIZUHO BANK, LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
